research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does amount_shock_5_20_raw appear compositionally compatible with the current core two-signal family of momentum_60_5_raw plus liquidity_trend_20_60_raw, or would it likely destabilize head selection and portfolio path if promoted into a later family round?

reference_core_family_contract.reference_score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 2
reference_core_family_contract.reference_portfolio_contract: Freeze the full v18 operational contract, including the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, TopK=10 width, current head extraction, and top-15 refresh hysteresis. This round does not run a new full chain and does not change any live portfolio rule.

screening_contract.tentative_screen_score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC), percentile_rank(amount_shock_5_20_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 3
pairwise_component_checks: core_v18_score vs amount_shock_5_20_raw interaction bucket monotonicity

disallowed_changes: Do not open a new family round inside this screen.
Do not run a new full chain or fixed test inside this round.
Do not change score family weights in the live contract.
Do not change the 0.70 ranking liquidity guard.
Do not change execution semantics, benchmark, or cost contracts.
Do not screen multiple new atomic signals inside this round.
decision_rule: If amount_shock_5_20_raw shows clean additive or at least non-destructive interaction with the v18 core family, preserves or improves static head-slice quality, and does not materially worsen head stability or liquidity proxies, it may be promoted into a future family-construction round. Otherwise it should remain a standalone keeper only.
notes: This round exists because direct family substitution with breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw failed despite positive standalone edge, which revealed that standalone keeper status is not sufficient for safe family promotion.
The project is now inserting a formal composability-screening layer between single-signal discovery and new family construction.
